blended.narrative: Boyne Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 4" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
